arts.ttl: Liam Manning makes George Earthy transfer admission as loanee nears end of Bristol City spell
arts.sum: Liam Manning has admitted he'd "love to" sign George Earthy permanently, insisting the West Ham United loanee fits the profile of player needed at Bristol City following his first-half equaliser against QPR. George Earthy has scored three Championship goals during his loan spell with Bristol City

arts.ttl: “Intelligent player” – Manager encourages club to buy Sunderland man left out of Le Bris plans
arts.sum: Pierre Ekwah joined Sunderland in January 2023 and was a regular until the end of last season. The midfielder lost his place at the Stadium of Light at the start of the season as Régis Le Bris left him out of his plans. arts.ttl: Preview: Bristol City vs. Sunderland - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Friday's Championship clash between Bristol City and Sunderland, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss responds to Rob Atkinson transfer question as Bristol City promotion mooted
arts.sum: Portsmouth manager John Mousinho has honestly admitted he doesn't know if Bristol City being promoted to the Premier League would change his side's ability to bring Rob Atkinson back to Fratton Park during the summer transfer window. Rob Atkinson left Bristol City on loan during the January transfer window, joining Portsmouth for the remainder of the season
